reference: Hello. I have recently started to take up bodyweight exercises. I can do around twenty pull-ups and fifty push-ups. However, I read that if the legs are not trained, the upper body will be restricted in size as the body will keep everything in proportion. But when I do squats, my knees make a popping noise. Is this safe? There is no pain in my knees, but when I carry out the exercise, the sound becomes louder permanently.
text: hello i have recently started to take up bodyweight exercises i can do around 20 pull-ups and 50 push-ups i read that if the legs are not trained the upper body will be restricted in size as the body will keep everything in proportion but when i do squats my knees make a popping noise is this safe there is no pain in my knees but when i carry out the exercise the sound becomes louder permanently
